_notes: Single source of truth for artwork metadata. Each entry is one painting.
'image' is the filename under public/artworks/. Add the file there, then append an entry here.
Schema is enforced by Zod in src/content.config.ts.

items.title: Radha and Krishna
items.description: Radha and Krishna meeting beneath a flowering tree, in classical Madhubani style.

items.title: Ganesha on lotus throne
items.description: Ganesha seated under a scalloped arch with a lotus throne, in Pichwai tradition.

items.title: Shrinathji
items.description: Blue-faced Shrinathji bordered by lotuses, in Pichwai-Nathdwara style.

items.title: Pichwai cow with lotuses
items.description: Spotted cow grazing among lotuses under a scalloped arch.

items.title: Tree of life with elephants
items.description: Tree of life surrounded by elephants and lotuses arrayed in concentric arcs.

items.title: Tree with elephants
items.description: Striped tree with two patterned elephants and a wave-line ground, in Madhubani style.

items.title: Tree with folk figures
items.description: Tree with seated figures, fish and birds beneath -- a folk-narrative composition.

items.title: Fish family
items.description: Three fish nested within an oval, set against a green field with a patterned border.

items.title: Twin fish
items.description: Two layered crimson fish bordered by floral motifs.

items.title: Mrgayugma
items.description: A pair of deer beneath a flowering tree. The Sanskrit title means 'pair of deer'.

items.title: Lippan birds and lotus
items.medium: Mud relief and mirror on board
items.description: Two birds among lotus blooms in a yellow Lippan mirror panel.

items.title: Textured leaf circle
items.medium: Tissue and acrylic relief on board
items.description: Circular relief with a stylized leaf radiating from sun and moon, in raised tissue texture.

items.title: Gond camel
items.description: Red dot-patterned camel and calf under a tree, in Gond style.

items.title: Gond elephant
items.description: Dot-patterned elephant beneath a tree with two birds.

items.title: Gond tree of birds
items.description: Striped tree with six dot-patterned birds among red leaves, in Gond technique.

items.title: Lotus woman
items.description: Stylized woman in indigo sari with golden halo, holding lotus flowers.

items.title: Holi portrait
items.description: Portrait of a woman with patterned shawl, presented with a row of Holi color packets.

items.title: Lotus meditation
items.description: Seated figure with lotus aura on a starry indigo ground.

items.title: Couple
items.description: Modernist study of two figures, one resting on the other's shoulder.

items.title: Portrait in red
items.description: Stylized portrait in red and grey with foliage backdrop and floral hair detail.

items.title: Birds in green
items.description: Six brightly patterned birds nesting in a green tree, presented in a wooden frame.
